functions.name: get_flights_by_aircraft
functions.description: Retrieve flight history for an aircraft by its ICAO 24-bit transponder address. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a'). Date range must not exceed 2 days. Only flights from the previous day or earlier are available.

functions.name: get_aircraft_state
functions.description: Get the last known live state of an aircraft: position, altitude, speed, heading. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a'). Returns current live data — not historical position at time of a past flight.
